commands.ai_bot.task.create_failed: Failed to create AI Bot for this task
commands.ai_bot.task.already_parsing: Bot is already processing a task
commands.ai_bot.help.footer: Type /ai_bot help <command> for detailed usage and examples
commands.ai_bot.help.unknown: Unknown command: %s. Type /ai_bot help for all commands
commands.ai_bot.help.short.task: task           LLM natural language task  /ai_bot task <command>
commands.ai_bot.help.short.task_all: task_all       Assign task to all bots    /ai_bot task_all <command>
commands.ai_bot.help.short.give: give           Give items to player       /ai_bot give <item> [count]
commands.ai_bot.help.short.save: save           Save bot to disk           /ai_bot save <name> [desc]
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.spawn:
Spawn a new AI bot
Usage: /ai_bot spawn [name]
Example: /ai_bot spawn miner1
If name is omitted, auto-names as AI_Bot_1, AI_Bot_2, etc.
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.select:
Set default target bot for subsequent commands
Usage: /ai_bot select <name>
Example: /ai_bot select miner1
After selecting, task/status/stop default to this bot
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.status:
Show bot status. No name = show all bots
Usage: /ai_bot status [name]
Example: /ai_bot status (all)  /ai_bot status miner1
Shows: task progress, pause state, active chain, AI state machine
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.task:
Cloud LLM task planning (requires API Key)
Usage: /ai_bot task <natural language>
Example: /ai_bot task craft a diamond pickaxe for me
LLM parses command → action sequence → executes. Falls back to local planner if no API key
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.task_all:
Assign task to all idle bots
Usage: /ai_bot task_all <command>
Example: /ai_bot task_all chop trees
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.stop:
Stop bot's current task
Usage: /ai_bot stop [name]
Without name: stops nearest bot
Example: /ai_bot stop miner1
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.pause:
Pause bot task execution
Usage: /ai_bot pause [name]
Example: /ai_bot pause miner1
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.resume:
Resume bot task execution
Usage: /ai_bot resume [name]
Example: /ai_bot resume miner1
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.remove:
Remove active bot from the world
Usage: /ai_bot remove <name>
Example: /ai_bot remove miner1
Note: remove kills world entity; delete removes saved disk file
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.goto:
Navigate to coordinates (float, supports ~ ^)
Usage: /ai_bot goto <x> <y> <z>
Example: /ai_bot goto ~10 ~ ~-5 (x+10, same y, z-5)
Example: /ai_bot goto 100 64 -200
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.mine:
Mine specified blocks with A* pathfinding
Usage: /ai_bot mine <block_id> [count]
Example: /ai_bot mine diamond_ore 5
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.gather:
Gather resources (auto-find + obstacle break)
Usage: /ai_bot gather <type> [count]
Types: WOOD, STONE, DIRT, SAND, COBBLESTONE
Example: /ai_bot gather WOOD 16
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.craft:
Craft items (auto-find workbench + craft)
Usage: /ai_bot craft <item_id> [count]
Example: /ai_bot craft diamond_pickaxe 1
Example: /ai_bot craft stick 4
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.follow:
Bot follows player with A* pathfinding and 2.5 block distance
Usage: /ai_bot follow <player>
Example: /ai_bot follow nightfall
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.follow_bot:
Specific bot follows specific player
Usage: /ai_bot follow_bot <bot> <player>
Example: /ai_bot follow_bot miner1 nightfall
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.give:
Give items from bot inventory to player
Usage: /ai_bot give <item_id> [count]
Example: /ai_bot give diamond 3
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.equip:
Equip item to armor slot or main hand
Usage: /ai_bot equip <item_id>
Example: /ai_bot equip diamond_chestplate
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.say:
Bot sends a chat message
Usage: /ai_bot say <message>
Example: /ai_bot say Task complete!
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.inventory:
Open bot inventory (9x3 chest menu)
Usage: /ai_bot inventory [name]
Example: /ai_bot inventory miner1
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.toggle:
Toggle auto features at runtime (no config change needed)
Usage: /ai_bot toggle <feature>
Features: autoFish, autoReplenish, autoReplace
Example: /ai_bot toggle autoFish
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.save:
Save bot state to disk (position, inventory, task)
Usage: /ai_bot save <name> [description]
Example: /ai_bot save miner1 Mining bot
Saved to config/aimod/bots/
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.load:
Load and restore bot from disk
Usage: /ai_bot load <name>
Example: /ai_bot load miner1
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.list:
List all saved bots
Usage: /ai_bot list
commands.ai_bot.help.detail.delete:
Delete saved bot from disk
Usage: /ai_bot delete <name>
Example: /ai_bot delete miner1
Note: delete removes disk file; remove kills world entity
